# Maywood Mile

> Michael Turco is seeking a great small business to acquire and operate for the long term. A search fund of one: looking for a single company with a strong foundation and great culture to run indefinitely.

## Who
Michael Turco, Founder. Operating alone.

## What
A search fund: a vehicle to buy a single small business and run it as its next owner, indefinitely. Not multiple acquisitions, not a flip.

## Why
Michael spent the past 5 years as a software product manager, where he succeeded by listening to customers, leading with a clear direction, and removing obstacles. Being an entrepreneur and small business owner has been a career goal since day one.

## Philosophy
Inspired by small business owners who strive to provide great outcomes for three groups: Customers (a product/service they trust), Employees (fair treatment and career opportunity), and Family (livelihood for them and their employees' families). Seeking a company that already delivers for these three groups.

## Target company
- Revenue: $1M-$7M annually
- Geography: Minnesota or Wisconsin
- Criteria: Strong foundation and great culture

## Contact
- Email: michael.turco@maywoodmile.com
- Phone: 952-206-5170
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelturco/
